signatureMove.name: Rabbit Punch
signatureMove.extraText: This attack deals +1 Dmg for each Animal within 4".

abilities.name: Herd Master
abilities.description: This character gains +1 energy during the Replenish Step for each friendly Murder Bunny in play.

abilities.name: Shepherd's Crook
abilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt to {Null}. If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Place a new friendly Murder Bunny in base contact with this character.

abilities.name: Summon the Jackalope
abilities.description: This action can also be taken if there is no friendly Jackalope in play. The Jackalope placed this way has no energy but is considered a permanent additional character in your troupe and may activate this turn.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Place a new friendly Jackalope in base contact with this character.
This character suffers 3 Wds. Place a new friendly Murder Bunny in base contact with this character.
